ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the survey was conducted */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the survey was conducted */,
  "survey_number" INTEGER /* Survey number */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the survey belongs to */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher for the survey */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the survey */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of survey (e.g., environmental, species, fishing) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the survey data */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_lead_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "depth" REAL /* Average depth of the site */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat (e.g., coral reef, open ocean) */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_data" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the data belongs to */,
  "lf_quad" INTEGER /* LF Quad value */,
  "lf_removed" INTEGER /* LF Removed value */,
  "lf_density" INTEGER /* LF Density value */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "species_common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "species_classification" TEXT /* Classification of the species (e.g., fish, mammal, plant) */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the species */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the species (e.g., healthy, stressed, diseased) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_data_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental data point */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the data belongs to */,
  "sst" INTEGER /* SST value */,
  "bt" INTEGER /* BT value */,
  "lunar_day" INTEGER /* Lunar Day value */,
  "temp_diff" INTEGER /* Temperature Difference value */,
  "water_quality" TEXT /* Water quality */,
  "salinity" REAL /* Salinity level */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH level */,
  "dissolved_oxygen" REAL /* Dissolved oxygen level */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the environmental data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fishing_data" (
  "fishing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fishing data point */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the data belongs to */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency value */,
  "kg_30m2" REAL /* KG 30m2 value */,
  "prev_removed" INTEGER /* Previous Removed value */,
  "day_unculled" INTEGER /* Day Unculled value */,
  "fishing_method" TEXT /* Fishing method used */,
  "gear_type" TEXT /* Type of fishing gear used */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel used */,
  "crew_size" INTEGER /* Size of the crew */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the fishing data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fishing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fishing_data_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User permissions (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the survey */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the survey */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed (e.g., view, download, modify) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
